scripts.clean: node -e "const fs = require('node:fs'); for (const p of ['dist', 'dist-server', 'dist-test']) fs.rmSync(p, { recursive: true, force: true });"
scripts.build: npm run clean && npm run build:server && tsc -p src/frontend/tsconfig.json && vite build --config src/frontend/vite.config.ts
scripts.test: node -e "const fs = require('node:fs'); fs.rmSync('dist-test', { recursive: true, force: true });" && tsc -p tsconfig.test.json && node --test dist-test/tests-ts/*.test.js
